name: Dr. Panda TotoTime
overview: The adventures of Dr. Panda and Toto as they go on awesome adventures in Panda City. They discover the world together with their friends Bip, Olette, Meimei, Hoopa, Moo, Richy & June and solve puzzles, learn about shapes, colors, numbers and more.

trailers.title: Dr. Panda TotoTime | Learn Letters, Colors, Numbers and more! | Kids Learning Video
